title: Roasted Pepper and Manchego Naan
description: A flavorful and spicy Indian-inspired flatbread filled with roasted peppers and manchego cheese. Perfect for snacking or as a side dish.
instructions: 1. In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, salt, and water. Mix well to form a dough.
2. Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until smooth and elastic.
3. Divide the dough into 6-8 equal portions.
4. Roll out each portion into a thin circle.
5. Heat a non-stick skillet or tava over medium heat.
6. Place a naan on the skillet and cook for 1-2 minutes or until it starts to puff up.
7. Flip the naan and cook for another 1-2 minutes.
8. Brush the naan with pisto and top with roasted peppers, manchego cheese, and Spanish peppers.
9. Fold the naan in half to enclose the filling.
10. Cook for another 1-2 minutes or until the cheese is melted and the naan is crispy.
